title: Move nexus to standalone Coolify hosting model

source.subject: fix: add references/bsharp to .gitmodules with update=none

body:
Move nexus to standalone Coolify hosting model

## Scope

- Production smoke on catalog analyze + OAuth against auth hub
- Document env matrix in nexus README/COOLIFY

## Provenance
- **Repository:** `beskid`
- **Commit:** [`c8e5fc4`](https://github.com/Cyber-Nomad-Collective/beskid/commit/c8e5fc4)
- **Subject:** fix: add references/bsharp to .gitmodules with update=none
- **Catalog tip:** [`c8e5fc4`](https://github.com/Cyber-Nomad-Collective/beskid/commit/c8e5fc4) (v0.4 cutoff 2026-05-27)
- **Status:** In Progress

## Catalog scope
- **Delivery version:** v0.4 (Platform services, auth, and delivery tooling)
- **Workstream:** `nexus`
- **Deliverable:** `v04-nexus-operational`

## In progress

beskid_nexus deploys as its own Coolify service (`gitnexus serve` port 8452, `GITNEXUS_HOME` volume) per AGENTS hosting matrix; submodule bump tracks docker-compose and runtime catalog changes.

## Remaining

- Production smoke on catalog analyze + OAuth against auth hub
- Document env matrix in nexus README/COOLIFY
